SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment

Class OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment.OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
OilInWaterDoseOptimizer
public static class OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable dose recommendation result.

  • Constructor Details

    • DoseRecommendation

      public DoseRecommendation(double setpointDosePpm, double effectiveDosePpm, double predictedOilInWaterMgL, double predictedMeasuredOilInWaterMgL, double targetOilInWaterMgL, boolean feasible, String status, String message)
      Creates a dose recommendation result.
      Parameters:
      setpointDosePpm - setpoint dose in ppm
      effectiveDosePpm - effective dose in ppm
      predictedOilInWaterMgL - predicted true OIW in mg/L
      predictedMeasuredOilInWaterMgL - predicted measured OIW in mg/L
      targetOilInWaterMgL - target OIW in mg/L
      feasible - true if the target can be met within the configured dose range
      status - recommendation status
      message - recommendation message

      Returns:

      Gets predicted true OIW.

      Gets predicted measured OIW.
      Returns:
      predicted measured OIW in mg/L

      public double getTargetOilInWaterMgL()
      Gets target OIW.
